titleStmt.title: SII 11.171: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 171. (B.K. No. 241 of 1928-29.) NĀVAḶḶI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF KALAMĒŚVARA.

summary.p: This inscription which is very badly damaged belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikrāmaditya VI) and introduces an official (name lost) as the governor of Beḷvala Three-Hundred and Puligeṟe Three-Hundred districts. It states that Daṇḍanāyaka Sāyipayya visited the temple of Svayaṁbhū Kalidēva at the request of Ballarasa and granted in conjunction with the Karaṇas, the agrahāra village Nārppoḷe as Paramēśvara-datti, for the worship of the god, repairs to the temple, students' stipends and the maintenance of the Bāla-śikshe.
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 46, Plava, Chaitra, puṇṇami, Monday, lunar eclipse, which regularly correspond to A.D. 1121, April 4, Monday. On this day there was a lunar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścumbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhemūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē © Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya © gaṇādhipatayem namaḥ © . © . © . © .
svasti samastabhavanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabha
ṭṭārakaṁ satyāśa yakulatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya rājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire .
naṁbudu rāmacaṁdranaṁbudu purukutsa purūrava
neṁbude negarteya vikramacakravarttiya . kṣiti tannatēja
rātikṣiti lōkake kaḷpakṣiti
gaḷoppuva yene negardda vikramāditya
ne negaḷda vikramādityana vijayaśrī śrīpatiya daṇḍanāyakaṁ daṇḍanāthacū
ḍāratnaṁ . jagama satkīrti janmabhūmiyene
yda vrittige natyudāttaguṇaṁ
rggakkumē . Ā mānadoḷu . ka . śrī vallabhanudare
rādhyanabja bha
va nudiyisida . Ā niḷayarenisi
dī prajñāniga ḷudiyisa
vaśiṣṭa Intā krita
yugādimiṁ kali gōtramukhaṁ jagadoḷu negaḷe
puruśārttha vaneṁba maṁ
completely damaged
dēvana tanayane
completely damaged
. © svasti samadhigatapaṁcama
cāgarādhēyar .
saṁtarppitasamastalōkaṁ . Aca
parāṁganāmukhāvaḷōka
mahimāprabhāva . māna
ykanīra bhaṭakaṭakama
nijakāminījananayana ka
yācakaja
ppuravarāmarōtta
sūṟekāṟa Anē
praśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ manaverggaḍe kannaḍasandhivigrahi
kāsigade yyagaḷu beḷvala mūnūṟuṁ puligeṟe mū nūṟu
pratipāḷanadiṁ dāḷuttamire
parigrahada maryyāde lakṣmiyaṁ sūkti
svāmi daṇḍādhipaṁ tatpādapadmō
pajīvi
damaged
kaṁdarppa
bhayāpahāri kalidēvana
dakṣa dakṣamakhasaṁharaṇa vāgaḷu . Ā paramātmana dibyaśrīpāda padāraviṁdapāmartthya manantāpu
ṇyamūrtti kēśavacamūpaṁ śrīsāyipayya nantākṣeṇadi . ballarasana binna padiṁ dalli ge sadbhaktiyiṁde baṁdīśvaranaṁ sa
llalitaṁ pūjisi taḷvilla dabhīṣṭārtthasiddhiyaṁ neṟe paḍeda . bhaktiyiṁ dittaṁ bā
lēndudharaṁ kalidēva gaṁdādaradinde sāyipayyacamūpa . © svasti śrīmaccāḷukya vikramavarṣada 46 ne
ya plava saṁvatsara caitrada puṇnami sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ maneverggaḍe daṇḍanā
yakaṁ sāyipayyapramukha karaṇaṁgaḷu Agrahāraṁ nārppoḷeya śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēva svāmidēvara Aṁgabhōgakaṁ
dēgulakaṁ māṭakkaṁ caṭṭavritti bālaśikṣe yinitumaṁ naḍeyisuvantāgi saṁdatti dēvabhōgamāgi sarvvabā
dhāparihāramāgi paramēśvaradattiyāgi biṭṭarīdharmmama narasugaḷārūrvvaru pratipāḷi sidavaru sāsira kavileya
kōḍuṁ koḷaguma suvarṇadali kaṭṭisi sāsirvvaru vēdapāragarappa sabrāhmaṇargge vāraṇāsi yargghya gaṁge
tīrtthadalu mi dharmmama naḷidāta sāyira kavileyumaṁ brāhmaṇaruma koṁda pātakanakku .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthivēndrāṁ bhūyō bhūyō yā
catē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasaha śrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . ©©
Digital edition of SII 11.171 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
